item.title: JuMBOs
item.description: <video width="240" controls> <source src="uploads/face-on.webm" type="video/webm"> </video> <video width="240" controls> <source src="uploads/edge-on.webm" type="video/webm"> </video> <video width="240" controls> <source src="uploads/inner-ej.webm" type="video/webm"> </video> <video width="240" controls> <source src="uploads/outer-ej.webm" type="video/webm"> </video> <video width="240" controls> <source src="uploads/both-ej.webm" type="video/webm"> </video> <video width="240" controls> <source src="uploads/cap-inner.webm" type="video/webm"> </video> <video width="240" controls> <source src="uploads/cap-outer.webm" type="video/webm"> </video> <video width="240" controls> <source src="uploads/cap-both.webm" type="video/webm"> </video>
